full_text:
Zhang Fan (Gongyi) 張範 (公儀)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Fan (張範), styledGongyi (公儀), was born in Xiuwu county, Henei commandery. His generosity got family members returned by bandits, he was a frugal man. Zhang Fan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Zhang Fan lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
